items.title: Investigation by The Atlantic reveals many millions of songs used for AI music training
items.summary: Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny and many, many more artists have had their work fed into AI models.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.summary: Critics say bans push kids to riskier alternatives and can be beaten with VPNs.
